calendar.matters:
Hearing On Petition To Approve Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing to redistribute funds from a previously approved compromise of a disputed claim of a minor into a different blocked account.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Matthew B. Lee, Esq. appeared for petitioner Felicia Rudolph, the guardian ad litem for the minor, Kalynn Orr. Neither the guardian ad litem nor the minor were present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted.

$30,000.00 shall be transferred from a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank to a blocked account with Washington Mutual Bank, located at 7145 Highway 5, Riverside, GA 30274. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Redistribution of funds from the previously granted Compromise Approving the Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Hearing On Petition To Approve Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jul-01-2008 Continued To Aug-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Minors' Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-30-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Christopher Andres, Esq. for Petitioner: Sharon Rudolph, Guardian at litem for: Apryl Orr, a minor Claimant, and aloso for Petitioner: Felicia Rudoplh, Guardian at litem for: Kalynn Orr, a minor Claimant, Orders waiving live testimony is in file.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petitions is granted and compromise is approved for each minor as follows:
Attorney's Fees $3,683.91
Costs $3,293.52
A net balance of $11,051.72 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 4300 Tweedy Blvd., Southgate, CA. 90280, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
See "ATTACHMENT 5 and 12" for details.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
